name: Schafkopf
description: Schafkopf is the iconic Bavarian trick-taking card game — four players, a 32-card German-suited deck (Eichel, Gras, Herz, Schellen), and a bidding phase where the declarer chooses a contract (Sauspiel partnership, Wenz, Solo, and others) that fixes the trump suit and partnership for the round. Tightly partnered, sharply scored, and the de-facto pub game of southern Germany. Played for centuries; rules vary slightly by tavern.
